## Author Checklist

<!-- Complete this before requesting review. All boxes must be checked. -->

- [ ] Frontmatter is complete — all required fields present and correctly typed.
- [ ] `id` matches the directory path exactly (`{project}/{###-name}`).
- [ ] `status` is set to `review` (not `draft`).
- [ ] `version` has been bumped per the [versioning policy](versioning/VERSIONING_POLICY.md).
- [ ] `updated` date is set to today (`YYYY-MM-DD`).
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes with no errors on all changed spec files.
- [ ] All required sections are present and non-empty: **Overview**, **Problem**, **Solution**, **Acceptance Criteria**.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable — no vague language ("fast", "intuitive", "should").
- [ ] `Out of Scope` section is present and lists explicit exclusions.
- [ ] Constitution quality gates in [templates/constitution.md](templates/constitution.md) are satisfied (author self-review gate complete).
- [ ] CI is green (or failures are explained in this PR description).

<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay special attention to, context that isn't in the spec,
     known trade-offs, or open questions that need discussion. -->
